spec.name: The Fallen Giant
spec.description: One of the ancient oaks has fallen, its collapse creating a long wound in the canopy and leaving a trunk perhaps sixty feet long across the forest floor. The upended roots form a wall of tangled wood and earth twice a man's height, and the underside of the trunk where it met the earth is a gallery of fungi, insects, and small plants that have colonized the wet bark. Animals have been using the hollow space beneath the main trunk as shelter — the earth there is trampled smooth and the smell of multiple species lingers.
